top_signals.title: China PMI Lays Relatively Constructive Picture for June: BofA
top_signals.summary: China’s factory and non-manufacturing activity fared better than expected in June. BofA's Helen Qiao says the supply-side factors have been "pretty resilient for some time," but the "question is really on the demand-side - consumption and investment." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australians' Trust in US Hits Record Low
top_signals.summary: A new Lowy Institute survey points to a significant shift in Australians' views on China, the US alliance, and President Trump. Research Fellow Charles Lyons-Jones joins "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" to unpack the results and their implications for Australia's strategic positioning in the Indo-Pacific. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
